notes: The game *occasionally* allows me into the menu and to start a match, however it tends to hang my entire laptop, requiring a hard reboot. On top of that, I get infinite loading screens more often than not which makes it literally impossible to play the game. Repaired the Anticheat, reinstalled Proton GE several times, switched to Experimental, verified integrity (0 issues with game files), and tested with latest WINE version. There are currently no updates for my graphics drivers as far as I'm aware.

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6800 XT (navi21, LLVM 16.0.6, DRM 3.54, 6.5.9-arch2-1)
notes:
"The client is not running the anti-cheat, or has failed the anti-cheat authentication".

This error rears its head again as I initially wanted to try out S19 to see if playing Apex could feel compelling again. This occurs regardless of whether I use Proton GE 7-50 (which I used prior to the S19 update), 8-22, Proton Experimental or 8.04. Verifying integrity of Apex files and Proton EAC Runtime has the same issue.

Checking the forums shows that EasyAntiCheat_x64.so appears to be missing leading to this cause. Either watch for updates on the forum and/or wait for new patches.
title: Apex Legends
